description: List of connections used by the element template. Connections are reusable, named configuration objects that externalize authentication, endpoint, and other setup details.

id.description: Identifier of the connection. Used to reference the connection in property bindings via FEEL expressions (e.g. =camunda.configurations.<id>). Required.

type.description: The type of the connection, referencing a connection schema (e.g. "slack", "aws"). Required.

label.description: Display label for the connection. Shown in the properties panel when selecting a connection.
